title: Nursery Rhyme. XXVII. Historical
content:
[The following may possibly allude to King George and the Pretender.]

        Jim and George were two great lords,
            They fought all in a churn;
        And when that Jim got George by the nose,
            Then George began to gern.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. XXVII. Historical" is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
